domains.title: Onboarding & first-run setup
domains.rationale: All default-pack seeds are correctly created in scheduled state with appropriate logs, meeting the journey expectations.

domains.title: Core data model & overview surface
domains.rationale: All documented task kinds reached the expected scheduled state with correct log entries

domains.title: Habits
domains.rationale: The habit reminder completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output task via the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Routines & multi-step daily flows
domains.rationale: All tasks reached expected terminal states and pipeline children were correctly created and scheduled/completed as described.

domains.title: Tasks (one-off)
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status with correct fields and early completion is allowed per rules.

domains.title: Goals
domains.rationale: The watcher is correctly scheduled with the quiet_hours gate and remains in scheduled state without premature firing.

domains.title: Reminders & escalation ladder
domains.rationale: The high-priority reminder correctly remains a single scheduled task without premature escalation tasks, adhering to the lazy ladder evaluation rule.

domains.title: Calendar journeys
domains.rationale: The recap task correctly transitioned to skipped and its onSkip child was created as a scheduled followup with proper parent linkage.

domains.title: Inbox & email triage
domains.rationale: The output task reached completed status with correct terminal state and logs, adhering to all spine rules.

domains.title: Travel
domains.rationale: The approval task completed and correctly created a scheduled output child as defined by the onComplete pipeline.

domains.title: Follow-up repair (relationships)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed as expected after the subject update, with correct terminal status and log entries.

domains.title: Documents, signatures, portals
domains.rationale: The reminder failed and correctly spawned a scheduled followup child as defined by the onFail pipeline.

domains.title: Self-control / app & website blockers
domains.rationale: The task correctly evaluated the travel gate, fired, and reached the expected terminal status with appropriate logs.

domains.title: Group chat handoff
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the custom watcher properties and no erroneous state transitions.

domains.title: Multi-channel & cross-channel search
domains.rationale: The scheduled output task includes the required contextRequest with ownerFacts, recentTaskStates, and entities, and its terminal status is correctly set to scheduled.

domains.title: Activity signals & screen context
domains.rationale: The task reached completed status via the health signal completion check within the lookback window, and all required logs and fields are present.

domains.title: Approval queues & action gating
domains.rationale: The approval task was correctly dismissed with appropriate terminal status and logs, and no required fields are missing.

domains.title: Identity merge (canonical person)
domains.rationale: The watcher reached completed status with correct subject and logs, and no required fields are missing.

domains.title: Memory recall
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the expected output configuration and no erroneous state transitions.

domains.title: Connectors & permissions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with high priority, appropriate metadata, and no premature firing, matching the expected end state.

domains.title: Health, money, screen time
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with the appropriate watcher kind, trigger, priority, source, and health_signal_observed completion check, and no premature fire or completion logs are present.

domains.title: Push notifications
domains.rationale: The high‑priority reminder is correctly scheduled with no premature firing or missing required fields, and ladder behavior aligns with lazy evaluation rules.

domains.title: Remote sessions
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with high priority and metadata, and no firing was required.

domains.title: Settings & UX
domains.rationale: The task is correctly scheduled with ownerVisible false and appropriate metadata, and no firing is required.

domains.title: REST API access flows
domains.rationale: The task has the required source and ownerVisible fields and remains correctly in scheduled state.

domains.title: Workflows (event-triggered)
domains.rationale: The watcher completed and correctly spawned a scheduled output child as per pipeline rules

domains.title: Multilingual coverage
domains.rationale: The reminder was correctly scheduled with the Spanish locale metadata and no improper failures.

domains.title: Suspected-but-unconfirmed flows
domains.rationale: The custom task was correctly scheduled and dismissed with appropriate terminal status and log entries
